name: Placental growth-rate parameter
tier_rationale: Tier C from Carter 2009 Placenta: review of factors affecting placental O2 transfer including the rate of villous surface-area expansion. Logistic-growth rate parameter is a model fit.
notes: Logistic growth-rate coefficient for the villous surface-area trajectory. Caveats: Logistic-shape fit parameter; not reported directly in source.

name: Initial villous surface area
tier_rationale: Tier B from Mayhew & Hannan 2015 Placenta 'Morphomics' review: human-placenta villous surface area at early gestation from stereological studies. Replicated across multiple morphometric papers.

applicability.population: Stereological measurements of human placentae across gestation

notes: Effective villous exchange surface area at the start of gestation (early-pregnancy reference).

name: Villous membrane thickness at term
tier_rationale: Tier B from Mayhew & Hannan 2015 Placenta 'Morphomics' review: harmonic-mean villous-membrane thickness at term, the most important determinant of placental O2 diffusing capacity (Mayhew 1986 morphometric analysis).
notes: Arithmetic mean villous membrane thickness at term.

name: Placental growth midpoint week
tier_rationale: Tier C from Carter 2009 Placenta: gestational week at which villous surface area reaches the logistic-curve midpoint. Model-fit parameter.
notes: Gestational age at which villous-area logistic growth reaches its inflection point. Caveats: Logistic-shape fit parameter; not reported directly in source.

name: Term villous surface area
tier_rationale: Tier B from Mayhew & Hannan 2015 Placenta 'Morphomics' review: term human-placenta villous surface area from stereological morphometric studies (~11-13 m^2).
notes: Effective villous exchange surface area at term.
